mapper.select: SELECT v.video_id, vs.view_count, vs.bullet_count, v.user_id, v.file_url, v.cover_url, v.duration, v.title, v.create_time, u.nickname FROM video v LEFT JOIN video_stats vs ON v.video_id = vs.video_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON v.user_id = u.user_id WHERE v.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY v.create_time ASC LIMIT #{current}, #{pageSize}

SELECT v.video_id, vs.view_count, vs.bullet_count, v.user_id, v.file_url, v.cover_url, v.duration, v.title, v.create_time, u.nickname FROM video v LEFT JOIN video_stats vs ON v.video_id = vs.video_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON v.user_id = u.user_id WHERE v.is_delete = 0 and v.category_id = #{categoryId} and v.video_id != #{videoId}

SELECT v.video_id, v.file_url, v.user_id, v.title, v.type, v.duration, v.tags, v.description, v.create_time, vs.view_count, vs.bullet_count, vs.like_count, vs.coin_count, vs.favorite_count, vs.comment_count, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM video v LEFT JOIN video_stats vs ON v.video_id = vs.video_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON v.user_id = u.user_id WHERE v.video_id = #{videoId} AND v.is_delete = 0 AND u.is_delete = 0 AND v.status = 2;

SELECT v.video_id, vs.view_count, vs.bullet_count, v.user_id, v.file_url, v.cover_url, v.duration, v.title, v.create_time, u.nickname FROM video v LEFT JOIN video_stats vs ON v.video_id = vs.video_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON v.user_id = u.user_id WHERE v.is_delete = 0 and v.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT v.video_id, vs.view_count, vs.bullet_count, v.user_id, v.file_url, v.cover_url, v.duration, v.title, v.create_time, u.nickname FROM video v LEFT JOIN video_stats vs ON v.video_id = vs.video_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON v.user_id = u.user_id WHERE v.is_delete = 0 and v.category_id = #{categoryId}

SELECT v.video_id, vs.view_count, vs.bullet_count, v.user_id, v.file_url, v.cover_url, v.duration, v.title, v.create_time, u.nickname FROM video v LEFT JOIN video_stats vs ON v.video_id = vs.video_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON v.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN `like` lv ON v.video_id = lv.video_id WHERE v.is_delete = 0 and lv.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT v.video_id, vs.view_count, vs.bullet_count, v.user_id, v.file_url, v.cover_url, v.duration, v.title, v.create_time, u.nickname FROM video v LEFT JOIN video_stats vs ON v.video_id = vs.video_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON v.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN coin cv ON v.video_id = cv.video_id WHERE v.is_delete = 0 and cv.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT v.video_id, vs.view_count, vs.bullet_count, v.user_id, v.file_url, v.cover_url, v.duration, v.title, v.create_time, u.nickname, fv.create_time AS favorite_time -- 新增收藏时间字段 FROM video v LEFT JOIN video_stats vs ON v.video_id = vs.video_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON v.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN favorite fv ON v.video_id = fv.video_id -- 新增关联收藏表 WHERE v.is_delete = 0 and fv.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fv.create_time DESC; -- 主查询排序
